title: Make command-center intake the default visible broad-directive path
description: TASK-175 recommendation #4 follow-up: document and lightly enforce a convention that broad operator directives enter through command_center_intake.py as the default visible path before decomposition, while urgent live-control messages remain exempt. Keep scope MAP-side; no CommandCenterUI edits.
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md documents intake-as-default for broad operator directives, including the urgent live-control exemption.
A lightweight MAP-side mechanism supports or verifies posting an intake packet as an hcom inform before decomposition without changing urgent-control behavior.
Focused tests cover the new convention/mechanism.
validate_events --fail-on-new, validate_task_mirrors, and relevant tests pass.
